payload.subject: Re: Any new pictures?
payload.body: hi grandma! so good to hear from you. i'll pull together some recent photos and send them over soon — there are some really cute ones from the past few weeks. love you!

parsed.rationale: Grandma requested recent baby photos — drafting a warm, low-commitment reply that acknowledges the request and promises to share photos soon, without attaching any images (none were provided in the event or memory slice).
